description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 15th, a test vehicle operating with the automated driving system engaged was traveling Northbound on Highway 101 in 
Sunnyvale. The safety driver disengaged just prior to running over a piece of metal in the road. No injuries were reported and law 
enforcement was not called to the scene. The vehicle sustained minor damage.
Print
Clear Form
